mapper.sql: id, source_text, target_text, source_lang, target_lang, remark, create_time, modified_time
mapper.select:
select
from t_translation_word order by modified_time desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_translation_word (source_text, target_text, source_lang, target_lang, remark, create_time, modified_time) values (#{sourceText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceLang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetLang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifiedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update t_translation_word set source_text = #{sourceText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_text = #{targetText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_lang = #{sourceLang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_lang = #{targetLang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modified_time = #{modifiedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
